notes: Pure thin-wrapper file — all 15 proofs are one-liners delegating to mathlib's AddMonoidHom API; heavy mathlib duplication is intentional (provides short rewrite names in project namespaces). No sorries, no heartbeat overrides, no long proofs. The file is only imported via the top-level HasseWeil.lean barrel; none of the HasseWeil-namespaced declarations appear to have confirmed callers within the project yet (new file), making them potential dead-code candidates if SeparableKernelTorsor.lean is not yet complete.
